---
title: "Boris Shor, PhD"
image: "files/images/shor-headshot.jpg"
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 70%
  links:
    - icon: globe
      text: Website
      href: http://bshor.github.io
    - icon: envelope
      text: E-mail
      href: mailto:bshor@uh.edu
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Google Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=ShUul74AAAAJ
    - text: "{{< ai dataverse >}} Dataverse"
      href: https://dataverse.harvard.edu/dataverse/bshor
    - text: "{{< ai ssrn >}} SSRN"
      href: https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/cf_dev/AbsByAuth.cfm?per_id=858121
---
